entry.title: FBL1N mass block
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to apply Payment block through FBL1N mass feature, but due to baseline date is not editable system is not allowing it.

 

Please find attached Document for detailed steps.

entry.title: Keine Beschreibungstexte in Transaktion KOH3
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

In der Transaktion KOH3 - Anzeige der Arbeitsgruppen - werden 99% der vorhandenen Beschreibungstexte nicht angezeigt.
Wenn ich mir den gleiche Inhalt über die Transaktion KOH2 anzeigen lasse,  werden diese wunderbar dargestellt.

Hat jemand das gleich Problem und konnte es bereits lösen?

Vielen Dank,
Bastian

entry.title: CJ88 getting error- Not possible to post down payment clearing. There are no down payments
entry.content: Issue while doing CJ88 getting error- Not possible to post down payment clearing. There are no down payments

entry.title: GGB1 substitution not getting triggered during AS02
entry.content: The substitution rule for evaluation group is working fine in AS01 for asset master creation. But the same rule is not working for AS02 in case of change asset.

entry.title: FBL1N - Order Number selection criterion no longer filters vendor line items in S/4HANA
entry.content:
System:
- SAP S/4HANA
- Reference system: SAP ECC

Issue Description:
In transaction FBL1N, the selection field "Order Number" (N° ordre - field BKPF-LOTKZ or display structure  RFPOSXEXT-U_LOTKZ ) no longer appears to be taken into account in the S/4HANA environments.

When an Order Number is entered in the selection criteria, the report returns vendor line items that do not correspond to the entered Order Number. The output is therefore not filtered according to this criterion.

Expected Result:
The report should only display line items associated with the entered Order Number, as observed in the SAP ECC system.

Actual Result:
The report ignores the Order Number criterion and returns entries that are not restricted to the specified Order Number.

Comparison with ECC:
Using the same selection criteria on the SAP ECC system, the filtering is correctly applied and only the expected line items are returned.

Business Impact:
Users can no longer reliably analyze vendor open/cleared items based on Order Number. This impacts operational controls a

entry.title: Update Processor through FIN_WF_AGENT BADI for Verify General Journal Entries Workflow
entry.content:
Hi Community Members,

I have implemented the BADI - FIN_WF_AGENT using the Custom Logic FIORI app in order to update the processor for Verify General Journal Entries workflow/

My requirement is to be able to dynamically assign processors for Verify General JE Workflow requests. I have a CBO where the list of approvers are maintained for each of the submitter (here submitter is the one who creates the JE using the Verify General JE FIORI app).

In the Manage Workflow for Verify General JE, we have added a deadline option which trigger after 1 minute of Step. And the initial recipient is another user (of type BP employee). This user (let's say USER_APRV) is also listed in the Manage Teams & Responsibilities FIORI app.

Now, when a new request is raised, initially the processor is set as USER_APRV. However, as the deadline callback class is triggered after 1 minute, the BADI implementation is also triggered and the processor gets updated. Inside the BADI the "old_agent" is replaced by the "new_agent".  Currently, the "new_agent" value is hard-coded. However, the requirement is that the "new_agent" should be determined by selecting the appropriate approver from the designated CBO based on the submitter of the request.

In the ABAP call stack, I can see that the method "if_swf_flex_ifs_run_appl_step~on_deadline_action_callback" of the class "CL_FDC_ACCDOC_VER_FLEX_RUN_APP" is being called and it contains the  workflow task id ("IV_TASK_WI_ID") as an importing parameter to the class. This task id can be used to query the CDS C_GLJRNLENTRYTOBEVERIFIED  to get the Journal entry detail along with the submitter.

Here comes the issue! Since the task id is an importing parameter and local to the class, I cannot read it using a dirty assignment technique. Also, I have using several other class-methods / Function modules to get the work-item id from the stack or the memory but nothing was successful.

If anyone has had such a requirement and was able to achieve this, it would be really helpful for me if you can share your insights.

Thank you,
Sayak

SAP Business Workflow  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Finance

entry.title: GL Account name language issue in FBL1N line item
entry.content: Login SAP Production system in Chinese, go to FBL1N vendor line item, enter vendor 1300, company code 1000, other parameters keep default values and execute F8, you can see the name of GL account 2202010100 is English name instead of Chinese name, because we maintained GL account master name both in Chinese and English, suppose it should display English name of account,  high appreciated if someone tell me the reason why.

entry.title: Make Optional Check number field for F-36 transaction
entry.content: We want to make the check number field as optional for f-36 transaction . we have even checked note no 3531338  system says it cannot be implemented.

entry.title: Mass clearing of GL account open items
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently performing archiving in our SAP system (ECC). During archiving, we realized that there are huge number of GL open items (62 million open item records per fiscal year per GL account) in older years (like 2012,2013...)

Type of GL account: Balance Sheet account. It is Open item Managed account but not a reconciliation account.

As per the SAP standard archiving process, the open items cannot be archived. The line item has to cleared to be able to archive it. Business has also accepted to clear these open items for older years by any means. We tried below ways to clear but could not be successful due to some challenges.

  • We tried F.13 automatic clearing program for clearing. But the primary rule for F.13 is that debit and credit balances must match. In our case, the majority of open items debit and credit balance don't match at the Profit Centre level, which prevents the system from clearing. 
  • We have identified scenarios where a finance document contains multiple Profit Centers. Since F.13 operates on a total balance basis rather than at the individual line-item level, it fails to recognize these complex offsets.  
  • We have also discovered that some items are already marked as "cleared" in the system. This has caused an imbalance between the actual debit and credit totals, further complicating the reconciliation process.
  • We also tried Standard SAP Program RFVD_CHK_CHANGE_CLEARING to update the clearing information and mark as cleared. But this program is not replicating the documents to CFIN S4 system. 

    Do we have any program to clear the open item in mass even if the debit and credit balance don't match. Or any enhancement idea to clear this GL account. Appreciate your response.

entry.title: AP Aging Report (IDCNAP/IDCNAR) – Enhancement Request to Aggregate by G/L Account
entry.content:
In the IDCNAP and IDCNAR Aging Report applications, the report results are currently grouped based on the selected Segment. As a result, the same G/L Account appears multiple times whenever it is associated with different suppliers or line items.

The business requirement is to have an option to aggregate/group the report by G/L Account, so that each G/L Account is displayed only once with the total balance, instead of showing duplicate G/L Account entries.

Currently, there is no standard option available in the report to group or subtotal the data by G/L Account.

entry.title: Force password change for Dialog user IDs on next login due to security policy change
entry.content:
Due to a change in Security policy, we have to force all the dialog user IDs to change the password in the next login. Is there any option available to force password change for Dialog user IDs on next login without a system restart?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to archive FI and CO documents with WBS elements in S/4HANA ?
entry.content:
Business requirement to archive FI, CO documents that involve WBS elements in S/4HANA. The process involves archiving WBS elements using the PS_PROJECT archiving object and related CO line items via CO_TRANS. Proper mapping and handling of WBS element numbers are crucial, especially in environments like Central Finance.

My help, but no explication for subledger part : https://learning.sap.com/courses/configuring-additional-settings-in-financial-accounting-in-sap-s-4hana/executing-data-archiving-for-specific-fi-objects

Business requires guidance on the steps, necessary configurations, and any relevant notes or best practices to ensure consistent and complete archiving.

entry.title: 資産振替処理を実施した際の振替元資産と振替先資産のデータ状況について
entry.content:
お世話になっております。

AS01→ABUMNで資産振替を実施しました。

※振替元資産の資本化日付・初回取得日：5/31、振替日付：6/30

※取得価額：263,000円、耐用年数：5年、償却額：3,933円

処理実行後の振替元資産／振替先資産のデータ状況を確認してみると、以下の点が気になります。

【振替元資産】

・1ヶ月分の償却を反映した232,067円が貸方に計上されているが、借方に3,867円が計上。

・今年度の残りの償却額に656円が設定されており、毎月65円or66円の償却が発生する。

・2031年度まで償却が発生するスケジュールになっている。

【振替先資産】

・1ヶ月分の償却を反映した232,067円が借方に計上されているが、貸方に3,867円が計上。

・償却額が振替元資産の3,933円から3,868円になっている。

　※ユーザには償却額の計算式は「取得価額 × 耐用年数に対する償却係数(5年だと0.2) ÷ 12」である事を説明済み。

ユーザ側は以下を希望されていますが、対応可能な内容でしょうか。

・振替元資産の今年度の月65円or66円の償却額の発生をなくしたい。

・振替先資産の償却額を振替元資産と同じく3,933円にしたい。

画面資料をご確認頂いた上で、仕様のご説明をお願い致します。

entry.title: OBPM4 – Company Code Not Visible for Payment Medium Format Despite Configuration Being Maintained
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in transaction OBPM4 (Payment Medium: Selection Variants), where one specific company code is not available/visible for configuration, while the other company codes are displayed correctly.

The payment medium format ZVIR_ACC_CGI_XML_CT is configured and assigned in APM configuration. The corresponding DMEE format for Virtual Accounts has also been maintained.

entry.title: Reg: Incorrect BOM usage in quantity structure of cost estimate.
entry.content:
After changing the BOM status to inactive of a costing BOM, we noticed that the Quantity structure in cost estimate screen picked a strange BOM usage as 9. 
We don’t have any BOM created for any of the material with usage 9 so far. 
And the production version of the material also has the BOM usage as 6 only. 

So, we would like to understand the logic behind this selection.
There are few materials with the same situation.

entry.title: Issue in standard Internal order report kob1 and kob1n,data not as per trial balance
entry.content: KOB1 and KOB1n showing amount but as per trial balance the balance for CWIP gl is zero.

entry.title: CK11N - inconsistent results
entry.content: We face different results for materials with a special procurement key.  Both materials are costed in the same plant and both have the same SPK defined. the same costing variant is used. Still in one case the cross-company costing is used and the other not.

entry.title: Report RFDUML00 liefert unterschiedliche Ergebnisse
entry.content:
Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren

Bei Selektion mit einem Buchungskreis und bei der Selektion mit mehreren Buchungskreisen liefert der Bericht pro Buchungskreis unterschiedliche Ergebnisse.

frdl. grüßt,

Klaus Tartler

entry.title: Account 402101 requires an account assignment relevant to cost accounting
entry.content:
Hi Team,

The business is facing an issue with Sales Order 582560563. The user is attempting to post a Goods Receipt (MIGO) against PO 4530995000, but is receiving the following error:

"Account 402101 requires an account assignment relevant to cost accounting."

The user has highlighted that out of the total quantity of 6, a GR for 5 units was successfully posted in 2024 without any issues. However, while attempting to post the GR for the remaining 1 unit, the above error is being triggered.

As a temporary test, we maintained a cost element assignment in OKB9, and the posting completed successfully without any error. However, this is not the recommended approach, and we would like to understand the root cause of the issue.

Reviewd KBA  from our end -

entry.title: F110 - To add fields in the AVL
entry.content:
Tcode : F110

To add the below fields in the ALV  for proposal run.

  1. With Holding tax 

      2. Net due date
